messages.content: Summarize this document in 3 bullet points.

- Parameshwar Reddy is a Full Stack Web Developer with experience in building scalable web applications, using modern technologies like React.js, Node.js, and Material UI, as well as integrating APIs and optimizing performance.
- He has a proven track record of improving user engagement by 30% through UI bug fixes and enhancements, and he collaborates with backend teams for comprehensive feature development and secure user access management.
- Reddy is pursuing a B.Tech degree at Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University and has a passion for delivering efficient code and innovative digital solutions, with interests in gaming and problem-solving.

Summarize this document in 3 bullet points.

- Parameshwar Reddy is a Full Stack Web Developer with experience in building scalable web applications, specializing in frontend and backend development using technologies like React.js, Material UI, and Node.js, along with integrating APIs and improving performance. 

- He has a proven track record of enhancing user engagement through web applications and is adept at fixing UI bugs, optimizing page speed, and implementing authentication for secure user access.

- Currently pursuing a B.Tech at Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, he has a keen interest in problem-solving, gaming, and creating responsive designs to improve mobile user experience.
